claim_status: no-claim workflow inventory only; no native UI implementation claim, no UI toolkit selection, no accessibility readiness claim, no screen-reader coverage claim, no manual assistive-technology coverage claim, no page-tree composition proof, no IME correctness claim, no keyboard completeness claim, no clipboard or drag-drop safety claim, no localization readiness claim, no zoom high-contrast reduced-motion readiness claim, no crash-recovery renderer-hang or GPU-loss readiness claim, no UI-GATE-7 claim, no UI-GATE-10 claim, no release-path UI approval, and no production claim

workflow_axes.name: Windowing
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove window identity, ownership, visibility, occlusion, scale, display, full-screen, close negotiation, focus return, and lifecycle recovery across trusted chrome and page surfaces.
required_evidence: resize, scale, occlusion, and close-negotiation output

workflow_axes.name: Input
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove pointer, wheel, keyboard, shortcut, command, gesture, and capture routing with explicit chrome-versus-page target identity and stale-epoch rejection.
required_evidence: trusted chrome and page-surface target split

workflow_axes.name: Input Method Editor
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove composition, candidate-window, selection, dead-key, emoji, East Asian, Indic, bidirectional, and committed-text behavior without cross-profile or stale-document confusion.

workflow_axes.name: Accessibility Tree
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove roles, names, values, states, relationships, actions, focus, bounds, live regions, tables, trees, and text ranges through platform accessibility APIs.

workflow_axes.name: Page-Tree Composition
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove trusted browser chrome and renderer-produced web subtrees compose into one assistive-technology navigation model without leaking hidden cross-origin or stale-document data.
required_evidence: composed chrome and web subtree snapshot

workflow_axes.name: Clipboard
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove clipboard data types, activation, profile-aware policy, sanitization, denial, and page-versus-chrome authority boundaries.
required_evidence: clipboard fixture with allowed and denied formats

workflow_axes.name: Drag-Drop
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove drag/drop offers, file handles, drop targets, trusted overlays, cancellation, and profile-aware authority boundaries.

workflow_axes.name: Localization
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove long labels, bidi labels, CJK labels, locale-sensitive formatting, shortcut text, and translated trusted-state copy without truncation or authority ambiguity.

workflow_axes.name: Zoom And Text Scaling
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove platform zoom, browser zoom, text scaling, magnification, layout stability, and page-surface composition at supported scale factors.

workflow_axes.name: High Contrast
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove trusted chrome, prompts, recovery UI, and page-surface boundaries remain legible and non-color-only under high-contrast appearance.

workflow_axes.name: Forced Colors
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove system color substitution preserves trust, permission, warning, focus, selected, disabled, and recovery states.

workflow_axes.name: Reduced Motion
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove shell transitions, alerts, lifecycle indicators, and agent status remain understandable without required animation.

workflow_axes.name: Crash Recovery
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove renderer, UI, and browser crash paths keep trusted recovery UI accessible, restore focus safely, and do not replay consequential actions.

workflow_axes.name: Renderer Hang
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove trusted browser chrome, stop/reload, recovery, resource manager, and assistive-technology navigation stay responsive while a renderer hangs.

workflow_axes.name: GPU Loss
workflow_axes.purpose: Prove GPU device loss rebuilds toolkit and page resources without corrupting the session model or losing accessibility state.

core_workflows.name: Browser Window Lifecycle
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: The window owns trusted chrome and page-surface generations; stale page-tree nodes must be rejected when a window closes, restores, or recovers.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No rendered reference shell, platform window trace, assistive-technology transcript, fault injection, or owner review exists.

core_workflows.name: Tab Strip And Groups
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Tab page-tree accessibility nodes must preserve tab, Space, profile, document-epoch, and selected-state identity before exposing any page subtree.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No tab overflow, keyboard, screen-reader, localization, density, 100-tab, or renderer-hang fixture has been executed.

core_workflows.name: Spaces Side Panel
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Space switching must update page-tree roots only after profile and Space authority are revalidated.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No profile-aware Space switching, drag/drop, clipboard, or composed accessibility subtree evidence exists.

core_workflows.name: Address And Command Field
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: The command field must remain a trusted chrome text field whose suggestions cannot inherit page authority or expose hidden page-tree data.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No IME, clipboard, shortcut conflict, accessible-name, suggestion, or renderer-hang command fixture exists.

core_workflows.name: Permission And Agent Confirmation
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Permission and agent confirmation page-tree-adjacent nodes must announce origin, profile, action, consequence, and denial paths without allowing page or model output to expand authority.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No manual screen-reader, keyboard, reduced-motion, high-contrast, or crash-recovery confirmation transcript exists.

core_workflows.name: Page Surface Composition
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Trusted chrome and renderer-produced page-tree subtrees must compose through typed surface, frame, origin, process, and document-epoch identities, with hidden cross-origin data excluded.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No page-surface stub, composed accessibility tree, hidden-cross-origin case, renderer crash replacement, or GPU-loss recovery evidence exists.

core_workflows.name: DevTools Docking
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: DevTools docking must expose tool panes, inspected page-tree state, and live diagnostics without granting page content DevTools or chrome authority.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No dock/undock, tree/table, clipboard, focus, or live diagnostic assistive-technology evidence exists.

core_workflows.name: Resource Manager
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Resource rows must charge window, tab, and shared page-tree owners without exposing hidden page content, widening authority, or confusing physical totals with inferred causes.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No accessible table/tree, update latency, memory-pressure, renderer-hang, GPU-loss, or localization evidence exists.

core_workflows.name: Settings And Recovery
core_workflows.page_tree_contract: Settings and recovery must keep profile, session, migration, update, page-tree, and crash-recovery authority in trusted chrome and never replay page or agent actions automatically.
core_workflows.missing_evidence: No settings form, recovery dialog, crash-loop, text input, screen-reader, or GPU-loss recovery transcript exists.

required_artifacts: AX tree snapshot for trusted chrome plus composed page subtree
VoiceOver manual transcript for core workflows
input, IME, clipboard, drag/drop, zoom, contrast, and reduced-motion fixture output
latency trace for focus, live-region, and tree-update events
platform_assistive_technology_matrix.missing_evidence: No macOS reference shell, AX snapshot, VoiceOver transcript, IME trace, or latency artifact exists.

required_artifacts: UI Automation tree snapshot for trusted chrome plus composed page subtree
Narrator and NVDA manual transcripts for core workflows
input, IME, clipboard, drag/drop, text-scale, high-contrast, and reduced-motion fixture output
latency trace for focus, live-region, and tree-update events
platform_assistive_technology_matrix.missing_evidence: No Windows reference shell, UI Automation snapshot, Narrator transcript, NVDA transcript, IME trace, or latency artifact exists.

required_artifacts: AT-SPI tree snapshot for trusted chrome plus composed page subtree
Orca manual transcript for core workflows
input, IME, clipboard, drag/drop, zoom, high-contrast, and reduced-motion fixture output
latency trace for focus, live-region, and tree-update events
platform_assistive_technology_matrix.missing_evidence: No Linux reference shell, AT-SPI snapshot, Orca transcript, IME trace, compositor-mode note, or latency artifact exists.

evidence_blockers.missing_evidence: No owner-selected reference platform or platform waiver exists.
No adapter runner exists for Slint, Vizia, Floem, GPUI, or an owner-approved reduced scope.
No rendered reference shell or equivalent adapter-specific shell fixture exists.
No renderer-produced page texture stub, damage stream, or composed web subtree fixture exists.
No schema defines platform tree snapshots, stable node identifiers, event timestamps, or hidden-node exclusions.
No qualified manual assistive-technology transcript exists for any supported platform.
No repeatable keyboard, dead-key, IME, composition, selection, or shortcut fixture harness exists.
No allowed/denied clipboard, drag/drop, file-handle, or profile-boundary fixture exists.
No localized, text-scale, zoom, high-contrast, forced-colors, or reduced-motion fixture output exists.
No renderer crash, renderer hang, UI crash, browser crash, or GPU-loss fixture has run.
No p50, p95, p99 event-latency, queue, memory, CPU, wakeup, or energy trace exists.
No accessibility, platform, UI-runtime, product, security, performance, quality, or release owner has accepted PB-015 evidence.

unsupported_boundaries: no clipboard or drag-drop safety claim
no zoom high-contrast reduced-motion readiness claim
no crash-recovery renderer-hang or GPU-loss readiness claim
